en.title: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 60

blocks.value: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 60
Top Question of the Week
How long bear market / wen recession?
Let’s step back and reframe that question.
Which markets and economies are in bear or recession territory? Which aren’t? And most interestingly — why?

What we’ve seen over the past many months might appear on the surface to be a tight squeeze between fast inflating prices and consumer appetite within the frame of how we’ve become accustomed to viewing the globalised economy. But take another look at that second part, are we really seeing a radical pull back in consumer appetite or behaviour?

It seems pretty clear that after two years of lock downs and pandemic related constraints on economic activity, consumers are actually on a vast spending spree that far exceeds the added fuel stimulus funding initially provided. If anything, consumers are showing almost nothing is going to stop their urge to spend, to break out from recent limitations and rapidly increasing demand across the board.
What we really see is a supply and logistics crunch.

Supply can’t meet demand. It is going to take years for that to change. And it really signals a shift of economics that have been consumer/information services based for at least 5 decades to a modern version of being production economies.
Most Common Repeat Question
How does Layer X reinforce DIGITALAX V3 and the most recent roadmap release?

The most important part to recognise is that in order to actually increase adoption and real usage of web3 technology beyond crypto speculation is that it must enhance day to day life in obviously tangible ways for everyone that holds a mobile phone in their pocket. From the decentralisation of commerce to media distribution and everything else that we do in geo tag, IRL and metaverse spaces.
Web3 will best be understood when it is far more clear what it does for you.
This is where Layer X makes engineering for this composable.
Top Controversies

There’s really no better way to fight fascism than the combination of free culture and a fist to the face whenever they cross the line from “oh it’s a joQe” to zpreading violence. The hard part is knowing where that line is while they run troll and hide attacks, DDOS the culture wars, and before they capture power.
Best thing to do while we’re all still free is call out their bullshit, support radically open culture by voting with our pockets, and distribute / decentralise the creation of wealth far and wide.
PFPs that aren’t CC0 are boring anyway.
Silly Fails and Trolling
Obvious clickbait but at the same time obviously showing what he really believes.
View all FUD FAQ here.
If you would like a question answered or contribute content to next weeks article please reach out through our DIGITALAX Discord server in #FUD-FAQ channel!

ar.title: FUD FAQ | ثريد مجتمعي اسبوعي | اسبوع 60

blocks.value: FUD FAQ | ثريد مجتمعي اسبوعي | اسبوع 60
Top سؤال من ال اسبوع
ازاي long bear market / wen recession?
Let’s step back و reframe that سؤال.
Which markets و economies are في bear or recession territory? Which aren’t? و most interestingly — ليه?

What we’ve seen over ال past many months might appear على ال surface الى be a tight squeeze between fast inflating prices و consumer appetite within ال frame من ازاي we’ve become accustomed الى viewing ال globalised economy. But take another look at that second part, are we really seeing a radical pull back في consumer appetite or behaviour?

It seems pretty clear that after two years من lock downs و pandemic related constraints على economic activity, consumers are actually على a vast spending spree that far exceeds ال added fuel stimulus funding initially provided. If anything, consumers are showing almost nothing is going الى stop their urge الى spend, الى break out من recent limitations و rapidly increasing demand across ال board.
What we really see is a supply و logistics crunch.

Supply can’t meet demand. It is going الى take years لـ that الى change. و it really signals a shift من economics that have been consumer/information services based لـ at least 5 decades الى a modern version من being production economies.
Most Common Repeat سؤال
ازاي does Layer X reinforce DIGITALAX V3 و ال most recent roadmap release?

ال most important part الى recognise is that في order الى actually increase adoption و real usage من web3 technology beyond crypto speculation is that it must enhance day الى day life في obviously tangible ways لـ everyone that holds a mobile phone في their pocket. من ال decentralisation من commerce الى media distribution و everything else that we do في geo tag, IRL و metaverse spaces.
Web3 will best be understood when it is far more clear what it does لـ you.
This is where Layer X makes engineering لـ this composable.
أهم الجدل

There’s really no better way الى fight fascism than ال combination من free culture و a fist الى ال face whenever they cross ال line من “oh it’s a joQe” الى zpreading violence. ال hard part is knowing where that line is while they run troll و hide attacks, DDOS ال culture wars, و before they capture power.
Best thing الى do while we’re all still free is call out their bullshit, support radically open culture by voting مع our pockets, و distribute / decentralise ال creation من wealth far و wide.
الـPFPs اللي مش CC0 مملة أصلًا.
Silly Fails و Trolling
Obvious clickbait but at ال same time obviously showing what he really believes.
